quick_skim.title: RL-Index: Reinforcement Learning for Retrieval Index Reasoning
quick_skim.abstract: Retrieving external knowledge is essential for solving real-world tasks, yet it remains challenging when the relationship between a query and its relevant knowledge involves implicit and complex reasoning beyond surface-level semantic or lexical matching (e.g., mathematical problems relying on the same theorem or coding requiring deep reasoning). Existing approaches primarily rely on query-side reasoning (e.g., query rewriting), which introduces significant online latency and underutilizes the opportunity to perform reasoning over the knowledge corpus itself (i.e., index-side reasoning). In this paper, we propose RL-Index, an agentic indexing framework that formulates retrieval index reasoning as a reinforcement learning problem. Instead of performing reasoning at query time, RL-Index shifts reasoning to the indexing stage by augmenting documents with LLM-generated rationales that explicitly encode the latent query-knowledge relationship. To optimize the quality of these rationales, we employ Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and use retrieval similarity as a verifiable reward signal, enabling direct optimization of indexing decisions for retrieval effectiveness. Extensive experiments on the BRIGHT benchmark demonstrate that RL-Index consistently improves both retrieval and downstream question-answering performance, while significantly reducing online inference latency. Moreover, the learned rationale augmentation generalizes across diverse retrievers and generators, highlighting its robustness as a plug-and-play indexing strategy across different retrieval systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Uses reinforcement learning to agentically improve retrieval index reasoning, applicable to post-training enhancement of agent capabilities.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用强化学习以智能体方式改进检索索引推理，可应用于智能体能力的后训练增强
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用强化学习以智能体方式改进检索索引推理，可应用于智能体能力的后训练增强
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用强化学习以智能体方式改进检索索引推理，可应用于智能体能力的后训练增强
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: RL-Index formulates retrieval index reasoning as an RL problem, enabling an agent to learn indexing strategies that capture complex query-knowledge relations, reducing online latency and improving retrieval for reasoning-heavy tasks.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: RL-Index 将检索索引推理构建为强化学习问题，提出一个智能体索引框架，通过学习索引策略捕获复杂的查询 - 知识关系。该方法避免了传统查询侧重推理带来的高延迟，在数学和编程等需要深层推理的任务上提升了检索效率与准确度。其贡献在于为知识检索提供了一种可学习的代理驱动索引机制。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: RL-Index 将检索索引推理构建为强化学习问题，提出一个智能体索引框架，通过学习索引策略捕获复杂的查询 - 知识关系。该方法避免了传统查询侧重推理带来的高延迟，在数学和编程等需要深层推理的任务上提升了检索效率与准确度。其贡献在于为知识检索提供了一种可学习的代理驱动索引机制。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: techniques for post-training of autonomous agents

quick_skim.title: SAGE: Stochastic Prompt Optimization via Agent-Guided Exploration
quick_skim.abstract: Context engineering has emerged as a primary lever for improving AI systems without parameter updates. Recent work showing that textual gradients do not function as real gradients motivates treating automatic prompt optimization (APO) as black-box search. We introduce SPO (Stochastic Prompt Optimization), a framework for stochastic search over prompt space, and compare three strategies of increasing sophistication: error-informed random search, a genetic algorithm with evolutionary operators, and SAGE (SPO via Agent-Guided Exploration), a multi-agent pipeline with diagnostic code execution. Across three benchmarks, no single strategy dominates; effectiveness depends on the interaction of landscape structure with error type. We further deploy SAGE on a mental-health chatbot under a continuous optimization paradigm, where it compounds eight cycles of individually-noisy A/B tests into a statistically robust gain in next-day retention. We argue that coupling qualitative diagnosis with quantitative validation is what makes agentic optimization effective for open-ended task-oriented dialogue.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Agent-guided prompt optimization as post-training improvement for autonomous agents
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 智能体引导的提示优化作为自主智能体的后训练改进
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 智能体引导的提示优化作为自主智能体的后训练改进
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 智能体引导的提示优化作为自主智能体的后训练改进
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes SAGE, a multi-agent stochastic prompt optimization that treats automatic prompt optimization as black-box search, using agent-guided exploration to improve AI agent performance without parameter updates.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对自动提示优化中文本梯度失效问题，提出将提示优化视为黑盒搜索的随机提示优化框架SPO，并开发多智能体引导探索策略SAGE，结合诊断代码执行。在三个基准上测试表明，策略效果取决于误差类型与搜索景观结构。该方法为自主智能体的后训练改进提供了无需参数更新的新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对自动提示优化中文本梯度失效问题，提出将提示优化视为黑盒搜索的随机提示优化框架SPO，并开发多智能体引导探索策略SAGE，结合诊断代码执行。在三个基准上测试表明，策略效果取决于误差类型与搜索景观结构。该方法为自主智能体的后训练改进提供了无需参数更新的新思路。

quick_skim.title: AI Economist Agent: An Agentic Framework for Model-Grounded Economic Analysis with RAG, Knowledge Graphs, and Large Language Models
quick_skim.abstract: We propose a model-grounded RAG-based AI economist with an agentic framework for economic scenario analysis using large language models (LLMs) and knowledge graphs. While LLMs can generate fluent economic narratives, economists are often required to make economic claims grounded by economic theory and real-world data. Based on this motivation, this study proposes an RAG-based AI economist, which utilizes knowledge graphs including economic data and theory and LLM-based agents to plan the analysis, retrieve relevant evidence, select appropriate models, and generate reports. In our framework, we do not produce quantitative claims directly with the language model alone; instead, we generate narratives grounded in explicit model-based computations and linked to the retrieved evidence via AI agents. We refer to our framework as an AI economist agent. We evaluate the AI economist agent in two applications: economist report generation for U.S. inflation persistence and Federal Reserve policy, and bank stress-test narrative generation for U.S. commercial real estate refinancing stress. The results illustrate how grounding the generated reports improves their economic coherence and traceability.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: AI Economist framework for model-grounded economic analysis using agents
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于RAG和知识图谱的AI经济学家智能体用于经济分析
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于RAG和知识图谱的AI经济学家智能体用于经济分析
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于RAG和知识图谱的AI经济学家智能体用于经济分析
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: An agentic framework for economic analysis uses RAG and knowledge graphs to ground LLM-generated narratives in theory and data, avoiding direct quantitative claims by the LLM alone.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对大语言模型在经济分析中常生成缺乏理论支撑的流畅文本的问题，本文提出一个基于RAG和知识图谱的AI经济学家智能体框架。该框架利用LLM智能体进行规划、检索证据和模型选择，生成有理论和数据基础的经济报告，避免由语言模型直接输出定量结论。实验表明该方法能够产生与经济学理论一致且可解释的经济叙事，为AI辅助经济决策提供了可靠框架。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对大语言模型在经济分析中常生成缺乏理论支撑的流畅文本的问题，本文提出一个基于RAG和知识图谱的AI经济学家智能体框架。该框架利用LLM智能体进行规划、检索证据和模型选择，生成有理论和数据基础的经济报告，避免由语言模型直接输出定量结论。实验表明该方法能够产生与经济学理论一致且可解释的经济叙事，为AI辅助经济决策提供了可靠框架。
